title: MolmoAct2: Action Reasoning Models for Real-World Deployment
summary: MolmoAct2 is an action reasoning model for robot control and real-world deployment, built on the Molmo2-ER embodied-reasoning vision-language backbone. It integrates robot state and action modeling with a flow-matching continuous action expert for closed-loop manipulation. The system unifies visual reasoning and low-level motor control, enabling deployment across diverse real-world manipulation tasks.
